welcome.title: Welcome to App-Bus
welcome.subtitle: Live ETAs for buses, metros, trams, and ferries.

kvkk.title: Privacy notice & consent
kvkk.intro: Under KVKK and GDPR, App-Bus processes your personal data for:
kvkk.data_residency: Data is processed in AWS Frankfurt (eu-central-1).
kvkk.rights: You can request access, correction, deletion, or data export at any time.
kvkk.scroll_required: Please scroll to the end to continue.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.intro: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgot.sent: If that address is registered, you'll receive an email shortly.

errors.kvkk_version_mismatch: The privacy notice was updated — please re-accept.
errors.too_many_login_attempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.delete_confirm: Your account will be permanently deleted within 90 days under KVKK. Continue?
